query:
SELECT 
                uc.id, 
                uc.name, 
                uc.base_url, 
                uc.priority, 
                uc.enabled, 
                uc.created_at
            FROM upstream_caches uc
            JOIN project_upstreams pu ON pu.upstream_id = uc.id
            JOIN projects p ON p.id = pu.project_id
            WHERE p.slug = ?1 AND uc.enabled = 1
            ORDER BY uc.priority ASC, uc.name ASC
